title: Pipeline Retry Storm - late arrivals and downstream dependency failure
text: Report date: 2026-04-15 Team: Sales Pipeline ETL Owners: multiple. Execution frequency: daily. Pipeline status: failed during processing. Data quality score: 89.09%. Error details: RuntimeError: downstream service timeout after 900 seconds while polling Inventory API

title: Malformed CSV spike in marketing clickstream
